Land2Living — Resale Listing Form

For stands and built properties within registered communal land

Paper Ref: LST-____-____-___
Date: ________________________

1. Seller Information

2. Stand / Property Details

Built property (house / structure)
Vacant stand (land only)

3. Asking Price

Price is negotiable

4. Seller Declaration

I, the undersigned, declare that I am the lawful occupant of the above stand, that I hold a valid PTO issued by the council, and that I have the right to list this property for resale subject to council approval.

Seller signature & date
Council witness / foot soldier signature & date

5. Council Approval (to be completed by council secretary)

Approved — listing may be published
Rejected — reason:
Council secretary signature & date
Council seal
Office use: Back-entered into L2L system:   System listing ID:
